structural_claim: Scale-dependent effective descriptions emerge systematically, with high-energy/small-scale physics determining low-energy/large-scale behavior through universal scaling laws

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Physical theories flow under energy scale changes, with relevant operators determining low-energy physics
Low-energy physics can be systematically described by integrating out high-energy degrees of freedom
Turbulent energy cascades through scales following universal power laws independent of specific conditions
Energy transfers hierarchically from large to small scales through self-similar eddy structures
